product_updates.title: Amazon launches its healthcare AI assistant on its website and app
product_updates.content: Health AI can answer questions, explain health records, manage prescription renewals, book appointments, and more.

product_updates.title: AI-powered apps struggle with long-term retention, new report shows
product_updates.content: AI can drive stronger early monetization for apps, but sustaining value remains the challenge, RevenueCat's latest report finds.

product_updates.title: ChatGPT can now create interactive visuals to help you understand math and science concepts
product_updates.content: Instead of just reading an explanation or looking at a static diagram, users can now engage directly with interactive visuals.

product_updates.title: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
product_updates.content: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

product_updates.title: Thinking Machines Lab inks massive compute deal with Nvidia
product_updates.content: The multi-year deal involves at least a gigawatt of compute power and also includes a strategic investment from Nvidia.

product_updates.title: Google gives in to users’ complaints over AI-powered ‘Ask Photos’ search feature
product_updates.content: The option appears on the Google Photos Search screen and lets users pick which experience they want.

product_updates.title: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legal tech boom endures
product_updates.content: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

product_updates.title: Meta acquired Moltbook, the AI agent social network that went viral because of fake posts
product_updates.content: Meta says that Moltbook's approach to "connecting agents through an always-on-directory" is novel.

product_updates.title: YouTube expands AI deepfake detection to politicians, government officials, and journalists
product_updates.content: YouTube's AI deepfake detection tool is becoming available to politicians, journalists, and officials, letting them flag unauthorized likenesses for removal.

product_updates.title: Adobe is debuting an AI assistant for Photoshop
product_updates.content: Adobe is also adding new AI-powered image-editing features to Firefly.

technical_breakthroughs.title: How Pokémon Go is giving delivery robots an inch-perfect view of the world
technical_breakthroughs.content: Pokémon Go was the world’s first augmented-reality megahit. Released in 2016 by the Google spinout Niantic, the AR twist on the juggernaut Pokémon franchise fast became a global phenomenon. From Chicago to Oslo to Enoshima, players hit the streets in the urgent hope of catching a Jigglypuff or a …

technical_breakthroughs.title: Prioritizing energy intelligence for sustainable growth
technical_breakthroughs.content: Loudoun County, Virginia, once known for its pastoral scenery and proximity to Washington, DC, has earned a more modern reputation in recent years: The area has the highest concentration of data centers on the planet. Ten years ago, these facilities powered email and e-commerce. Today, thanks to …

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: AI’s role in the Iran war, and an escalating legal fight
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
